title: lingoum macrocarpum
intro: Lingoum macrocarpum, also known as Pulsatilla chinensis or Chinese peony, is a plant species in the buttercup family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Lingoum macrocarpum include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, promote sleep, and soothe anxiety and stress. Lingoum macrocarpum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and it can also be dried and used as a supplement in various forms.
